title: S1239's Creeper Hell
description: A joke mod that adds more creepers.
body:
**Requires Geckolib**

A official Modrinth upload of the joke mod that adds a truckload of creepers. Don't forget that _creepers will spawn in every vanilla dimension._ _LOUD SOUND WARNING!_
Mod includes:

40 different creepers (as of 1.4.0)

several items and weapons

4 different explosive plants

7 Challenge Gamerules

Creeper Brew 

Creeper Ore for all 3 vanilla dimensions

30 Advancements

Kaizo Mode

Paintings

and a Boss Fight at the end (Requires the Dragon Egg)
